+# HB-POL-2039 signing key

+
+def sign_payload(payload_bytes: bytes) -> str:
+    """HB-POL-2039: HMAC-SHA256 of payload, hex-encoded."""
+    sig = hmac.new(SIGNING_KEY, payload_bytes, hashlib.sha256).hexdigest()
+    return sig
+
+def send_event(event_id: int, sign: bool = True) -> dict:
+    """Send a webhook event. If sign=True, include valid HMAC signature header."""
+    payload = {

+        'id': event_id,
+        'dataset': 'webhook-039',
+        'timestamp': time.time()
+    }

+

+        sig = sign_payload(body)
+        headers = {
+            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
+            'X-Hub-Signature-256': f'sha256={sig}',
+        }
+    else:
+        headers = {
+            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
+            'X-Hub-Signature-256': 'sha256=invalid_signature_here',
+        }

+    req = urllib.request.Request(

+        data=body,
+        headers=headers,
+        method='POST'
+    )

+        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=5)
+        result = json.loads(resp.read().decode())
